reason: Verify the change against the backend pre-development checklist and core project rules.
Check that implementation respects layer boundaries and approved file/module ownership.
Check storage abstractions, atomic persistence, schema metadata, and avoidance of pickle or out-of-scope databases.
Check all known service failures return stable {code, message, detail} errors.
Check search and rebuild paths preserve useful logging fields without leaking sensitive text.
Check M0 test coverage, deterministic behavior, rebuild safety, and scope control.
Review whether duplicated logic or scattered constants should be consolidated.
Review cross-layer data contracts for consistency between API, CLI, state, storage, and tests.
